particulars.description: By way of fixed charge, the charged property and all rights relating to it not effectively mortgaged in the lender’s favour as security for the secured liabilities;. By way of fixed charge, the book debts and all the borrowers’ rights, title, interest, and benefit in and to the book debts account;. By way of fixed charge, all the intellectual property owned, possessed or controlled by the borrowers which is not assigned to the lender;. By way of fixed charge, the plant and machinery;. By way of fixed charge, the shares;. By way of fixed charge, all the goodwill and uncalled capital for the time being of the borrowers;. By way of floating charge, all the undertaking and assets of the borrowers whatsoever, wherever situate, whether movable, immovable, present or future.

persons_entitled.name: Santander UK PLC as Security Trustee
